name: Cranberry & Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450°F.
Peel, core, and slice apples into slices that are 1/8 inch thick.
Roll pie crust out on a lightly floured board to be 1/8 inch thick.
Cut out two rounds that are 11 inches in diameter.
Fit one round into a 9-inch tart pan.
Combine cranberries, apples, sugar, flour, and nutmeg. Spoon the mixture into a pie plate.
Cover with the second round of crust. Seal the edges by crimping decoratively.
Make slits in the top to allow steam vents.
Bake for 10 minutes; then reduce heat to 375°F and bake for 35 to 40 minutes more.
Serve warm or chilled.
